goal: Reduce duplicated RF classification and similarity hardcoding by routing taxonomy decisions through shared triage, signature concepts, and signature weight rules.

steps.name: taxonomy-shared-triage
steps.summary: classifyDesenseCase now uses shared triage as its baseline and concept-aware signature checks before falling back to legacy text clues.

steps.name: similarity-weight-consolidation
steps.summary: Similarity scoring now uses signature concept comparison and signature weight rules instead of a second RF key-weight table and legacy value regex normalization.

steps.name: verification-and-record
steps.summary: Added cleanup smoke coverage and updated test/docs/phase records.
